+ "import \"google/protobuf/timestamp.proto\";\nimport \"google/protobuf/struct.proto\";\nimport \"google/protobuf/any.proto\";\nimport \"google/protobuf/descriptor.proto\";\n\nmessage TypeIdentifier {\n    message Primitive {\n        enum MeasurementUnitType {\n            MeasurementUnitType_UNSPECIFIED = 0;\n            MeasurementUnitType_LENGTH = 1;\n            MeasurementUnitType_MASS = 2;\n            MeasurementUnitType_TEMPERATURE = 3;\n            MeasurementUnitType_VOLUME = 4;\n            MeasurementUnitType_SPEED = 5;\n            MeasurementUnitType_ENERGY = 6;\n            MeasurementUnitType_DURATION = 7;\n            MeasurementUnitType_ACCELERATION = 8;\n            MeasurementUnitType_ANGLE = 9;\n            MeasurementUnitType_AREA = 10;\n            MeasurementUnitType_CONCENTRATION_MASS = 11;\n            MeasurementUnitType_DISPERSION = 12;\n            MeasurementUnitType_ELECTRIC_CHARGE = 13;\n            MeasurementUnitType_ELECTRIC_CURRENT = 14;\n            MeasurementUnitType_ELECTRIC_POTENTIAL_DIFFERENCE = 15;\n            MeasurementUnitType_ELECTRIC_RESISTANCE = 16;\n            MeasurementUnitType_FREQUENCY = 17;\n            MeasurementUnitType_FUEL_EFFICIENCY = 18;\n            MeasurementUnitType_ILLUMINANCE = 19;\n            MeasurementUnitType_INFORMATION_STORAGE = 20;\n            MeasurementUnitType_POWER = 21;\n            MeasurementUnitType_PRESSURE = 22;\n        }\n\n        oneof Primitive_kind {\n            google.protobuf.NullValue none_p = 1;\n            google.protobuf.NullValue bool = 2;\n            google.protobuf.NullValue int = 3;\n            google.protobuf.NullValue number = 4;\n            google.protobuf.NullValue decimal = 5;\n            google.protobuf.NullValue string = 6;\n            google.protobuf.NullValue date = 7;\n            google.protobuf.NullValue dateComponents = 8;\n            google.protobuf.NullValue url = 9;\n            google.protobuf.NullValue dictionary = 10;\n            google.protobuf.NullValue attributedString = 11;\n            MeasurementUnitType measurement = 12;\n            google.protobuf.NullValue currencyAmount = 13;\n            google.protobuf.NullValue paymentMethod = 14;\n            google.protobuf.NullValue placemark = 15;\n            google.protobuf.NullValue person = 16;\n            google.protobuf.NullValue file = 17;\n            google.protobuf.NullValue app = 18;\n            google.protobuf.NullValue searchableItem = 19;\n        }\n    }\n\n    message Custom {\n        string bundleIdentifier = 1;\n        string typeName = 2;\n    }\n\n    oneof TypeIdentifier_kind {\n        Primitive primitive = 1;\n        Custom custom = 2;\n    }\n}\n\nmessage SystemTypeProtocol {\n    message IntentUpdatableEntity {\n        string actionIdentifier = 1;\n    }\n\n    message AssistantSchema {\n        AssistantSchemaIdentifier identifier = 1;\n    }\n\n    message PersistentFileIdentifiable {\n        repeated string supportedContentTypes = 1;\n    }\n\n    oneof SystemTypeProtocol_kind {\n        google.protobuf.NullValue unknown = 1;\n        google.protobuf.NullValue mailAccount = 2;\n        google.protobuf.NullValue mailAddressee = 3;\n        google.protobuf.NullValue mailMessage = 4;\n        google.protobuf.NullValue mailbox = 5;\n        google.protobuf.NullValue intentMessage = 6;\n        google.protobuf.NullValue messageGroup = 7;\n        google.protobuf.NullValue messageParticipants = 8;\n        google.protobuf.NullValue uniqueEntity = 9;\n        IntentUpdatableEntity intentUpdatableEntity = 10;\n        google.protobuf.NullValue urlRepresentable = 11;\n        google.protobuf.NullValue visualSearch = 12;\n        google.protobuf.NullValue visualSearchOcr = 13;\n        AssistantSchema assistantSchema = 14;\n        google.protobuf.NullValue updatableEntity = 15;\n        PersistentFileIdentifiable persistentFileIdentifiable = 16;\n    }\n}\n\nmessage TypeDefinition {\n    message Version1 {\n        message Entity {\n            enum RuntimeFlags {\n                RuntimeFlags_UNSPECIFIED = 0;\n                RuntimeFlags_TRANSIENT_APP_ENTITY = 1;\n            }\n\n            message Property {\n                string id = 1;\n                string displayName = 2;\n                TypeInstance type = 3;\n            }\n\n            TypeIdentifier identifier = 1;\n            repeated Property properties = 2;\n            repeated RuntimeRequirement runtimeRequirements = 3;\n            TypeDisplayRepresentation displayRepresentation = 4;\n            repeated SampleInvocationDefinition sampleInvocations = 5;\n            repeated SystemTypeProtocol systemProtocols = 6;\n            repeated RuntimeFlags runtimeFlags = 7;\n            repeated CoercionDefinition coercions = 8;\n        }\n\n        message Enumeration {\n            enum Kind {\n                Kind_UNKNOWN = 0;\n                Kind_APP_ENUM = 1;\n                Kind_ACTION_ENUM = 2;\n            }\n\n            message Case {\n                string id = 1;\n                DisplayRepresentation displayRepresentation = 2;\n            }\n\n            TypeIdentifier identifier = 1;\n            repeated Case cases = 2;\n            repeated RuntimeRequirement runtimeRequirements = 3;\n            TypeDisplayRepresentation displayRepresentation = 4;\n            Kind kind = 5;\n            repeated SystemTypeProtocol systemProtocols = 6;\n        }\n\n        message Query {\n            message PredicateTemplates {\n                repeated ComparisonPredicate.Template comparison = 1;\n                optional StringSearchPredicate.Template stringSearch = 2;\n                optional IdSearchPredicate.Template idSearch = 3;\n                optional AllPredicate all = 4;\n                optional SuggestedPredicate suggested = 5;\n                repeated SampleInvocationDefinition sampleInvocations = 6;\n                optional SearchableItemPredicate.Template searchableItem = 7;\n                optional ValidPredicate valid = 8;\n            }\n\n            TypeIdentifier identifier = 1;\n            PredicateTemplates templates = 2;\n        }\n\n        oneof Version1_kind {\n            TypeIdentifier.Primitive primitive = 1;\n            Entity entity = 2;\n            Enumeration enumeration = 3;\n            Query query = 4;\n        }\n    }\n}\n\nmessage TypedValue {\n    message ID {\n        bytes serializedVariable = 1;\n        TypeInstance typeInstance = 2;\n    }\n\n    message PrimitiveValue {\n        message Decimal {\n            enum Sign {\n                Sign_UNSPECIFIED = 0;\n                Sign_MINUS = 1;\n                Sign_PLUS = 2;\n            }\n\n            Sign sign = 1;\n            int64 exponent = 2;\n            optional google.protobuf.Any significand = 3; // is a recursive reference to Decimal\n        }\n\n        message Measurement {\n            string unit = 1;\n            double value = 2;\n            TypeIdentifier.Primitive.MeasurementUnitType unitType = 3;\n        }\n\n        message CurrencyAmount {\n            Decimal amount = 1;\n            string currencyIdentifier = 2;\n            optional DisplayRepresentation displayRepresentation = 3;\n        }\n\n        message PaymentMethod {\n            enum Type {\n                Type_UNSPECIFIED = 0;\n                Type_CHECKING = 1;\n                Type_SAVINGS = 2;\n                Type_BROKERAGE = 3;\n                Type_DEBIT = 4;\n                Type_CREDIT = 5;\n                Type_PREPAID = 6;\n                Type_STORE = 7;\n                Type_APPLE_PAY = 8;\n            }\n\n            Type type = 1;\n            optional string identificationHint = 2;\n            optional DisplayRepresentation displayRepresentation = 3;\n        }\n\n        message Placemark {\n            bytes placemark = 1;\n            DisplayRepresentation displayRepresentation = 2;\n        }\n\n        message Person {\n            bytes person = 1;\n            DisplayRepresentation displayRepresentation = 2;\n        }\n\n        message File {\n            bytes file = 1;\n            DisplayRepresentation displayRepresentation = 2;\n        }\n\n        message App {\n            string bundleIdentifier = 1;\n            DisplayRepresentation displayRepresentation = 2;\n        }\n\n        message DateComponents {\n            enum CalendarIdentifier {\n                UNSPECIFIED = 0;\n                GREGORIAN = 1;\n                BUDDHIST = 2;\n                CHINESE = 3;\n                COPTIC = 4;\n                ETHIOPIC_AMETE_MIHRET = 5;\n                ETHIOPIC_AMETE_ALEM = 6;\n                HEBREW = 7;\n                ISO8601 = 8;\n                INDIAN = 9;\n                ISLAMIC = 10;\n                ISLAMIC_CIVIL = 11;\n 7;\n}\n\nmessage ContainerDefinition {\n    message Device {\n        oneof Device_kind {\n            google.protobuf.NullValue local = 1;\n            string remote = 2;\n        }\n    }\n\n optional string teamId = 6;\n    Device device = 7;\n    Origin origin = 8;\n}\n\nmessage TypeDisplayRepresentation {\n    string name = 1;\n    optional string numericFormat = 2;\n    repeated string synonyms = 3;\n}\n\nmessage PluginModelData {\n    bytes value = 1;\n    string bundleIdentifier = 2;\n}\n\nmessage DisplayRepresentation {\n    message Storage {\n        bytes data = 1;\n    }\n\n bytes configurationData = 3;\n            }\n\n            oneof Static_kind {\n                bytes data = 1;\n                Symbol symbol = 2;\n                string file = 3;\n            }\n        }\n\n        oneof Image_kind {\n            Storage lazy = 1;\n            Static static = 2;\n        }\n    }\n\n    string title = 1;\n    optional Subtitle subtitle = 2;\n    optional AltText altText = 3;\n    optional Image image = 4;\n    repeated string synonyms = 5;\n    optional PluginModelData snippetPluginModel = 6;\n}\n\nmessage CoercionDefinition {\n    enum CoercionDirection {\n        CoercionDirection_IMPORT = 0;\n        CoercionDirection_EXPORT = 1;\n    }\n\n    CoercionDirection direction = 1;\n    TypeInstance typeInstance = 2;\n}\n\n// Contains
